Iran never claimed it, Netanyahu talked about it while adressing Europe and trying to scare them off with this supposed 4500km range missile. That's enough evidence for me. The strike doesn't make sense for Iran to do anyways.

summaryKo: 제31해병 원정부대(31MEU) 소속 미 해병대가 미 7함대 작전지역에서 작전 중인 아메리카급 강습상륙함 USS 트리폴리(LHA-7)호에서 에픽 푸 작전(Operation Epic Fu)을 지원하기 위해 중동으로 향하는 중 총격을 가하고 있다.
summaryEn: U.S. Marines, assigned to the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit (31st MEU), conduct a gun shoot onboard the America-class amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli (LHA-7) operating in the U.S. 7th Fleet Area-of-Operations, while enroute to the Middle East in support of Operation Epic Fury, March 20, 2026.

summaryEn: The Qom Turbine Engine Production Plant produced gas turbine engines for attack drones and aircraft components used by Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps. The photo dated on March 6, 2026 shows the plant before U.S. airstrikes and the second photo shows the plant three days later after a devastating attack from U.S. forces.
